title: xQc ignites online storm with bold gender dynamics take on female police officers during livestream
summary_full: Felix xQc Lengyel sparked debate after sharing views on female police officers giving commands during a May 3 livestream. His comments divided fans, with some agreeing and others criticizing him. He later explained that gender can affect different policing situations. The discussion quickly spread online, adding to recent attention around his statements on esports and public topics.
